Tarek Ibrahim is a Python Developer with contact information including email (tarek.ibrahim@email.com) and phone number (+20 100 123 4567), along with links to his GitHub and LinkedIn profiles.
Tarek Ibrahim obtained a Bachelor of Engineering (BE) from Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Marathwada University in May 2022, achieving a CGPA of 3.7/4.0 in Aurangabad, India.

From June 2022 to the present, Tarek Ibrahim has worked as a Python Developer at Arsys Inovics pvt ltd in Cairo, Egypt, participating in all stages of the project lifecycle and developing user-friendly website interfaces with Python and Django.

During his time at Arsys Inovics pvt ltd, Tarek Ibrahim created CRUD methods for API interactions, worked with JSON-based REST Web services, wrote Python routines for web crawling and data fetching, and created unit tests to ensure code quality.
Tarek Ibrahim utilized Agile/Scrum methodologies and Jira for issue management and sprint tracking, and used Git and GitHub for version control and code deployment.

From January 2023 to June 2023, Tarek Ibrahim developed a Frequency Monitoring and Analysis Systems (F-MAS) for telecommunications service providers, utilizing Django, Django REST API, MySQL, PyMySQL, Python, HTML5, and CSS3.

Tarek Ibrahim possesses skills in Python, Django, Django REST Framework, SQLAlchemy, Requests, Urllib, MySQL, Oracle, Sqlite, MongoDB, HTML, CSS, RESTful Web Services, JSON, Windows, Unix, Git, GitHub, Jira, Agile, and Scrum.

Django is a high-level Python web framework, favored by developers like Tarek Ibrahim for its ability to rapidly build secure and maintainable websites. It’s a versatile tool, capable of handling everything from simple content management systems to complex, data-driven applications. Ibrahim has leveraged Django extensively, not only in his role at Arsys Inovics, contributing to all phases of project development and crafting intuitive user interfaces, but also in the creation of specialized systems like F-MAS – a Frequency Monitoring and Analysis System for telecommunications. 

Django’s strength lies in its “batteries included” philosophy, offering built-in features for common web development tasks. It readily integrates with databases like MySQL, Oracle, Sqlite, and MongoDB, and excels at building RESTful APIs, as demonstrated by Ibrahim’s work with Django REST Framework. It’s a framework that empowers developers to focus on the unique aspects of their projects, rather than reinventing the wheel, making it a cornerstone of modern web development and a key skill for professionals like Tarek Ibrahim.

Tarek Ibrahim is a driven Python Developer currently building solutions at Arsys Inovics pvt ltd in Cairo, Egypt. A recent graduate – earning a Bachelor of Engineering from Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Marathwada University in May 2022 with a strong 3.7/4.0 CGPA – he quickly transitioned academic success into practical application. He’s a full-lifecycle developer, comfortable crafting user-friendly website interfaces with Python and Django, and adept at the intricacies of API interaction through CRUD methods and JSON-based REST Web services. 

Tarek doesn’t just build; he ensures quality, evidenced by his commitment to writing comprehensive unit tests. He’s equally comfortable extracting data, having developed Python routines for web crawling and data fetching. His toolkit extends beyond core languages to encompass a broad range of technologies including MySQL, Oracle, Sqlite, MongoDB, HTML, CSS, and a mastery of version control using Git and GitHub. 

He operates efficiently within Agile/Scrum frameworks, utilizing Jira for meticulous issue management and sprint tracking. Notably, Tarek recently spearheaded the development of a Frequency Monitoring and Analysis Systems (F-MAS) for telecommunications providers, demonstrating his ability to deliver complex projects utilizing Django, Django REST API, and related technologies. He can be reached at tarek.ibrahim@email.com or +20 100 123 4567, and his work can be explored further on GitHub and LinkedIn.
